info.title: Tumbas POS API
info.description: Minimal point of sale API for products, checkout, sales history, and sales summary.

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Stock movements, receiving, adjustment, and opname

tags.name: Activity Logs
tags.description: System and user activity audit logs

tags.name: Receiving
tags.description: Stock receiving and supplier shipment tracking

tags.name: Opname
tags.description: Physical inventory counting and stock opname

tags.name: Cash Drawer
tags.description: Cash drawer shift opening, cash movements, closing, and audit trail

post.description: Authenticates a user with username and password, returns a Sanctum access token.
Revokes the personal access token being used to authenticate the current request.

get.description: Returns details of the currently logged-in user, including their assigned roles and permissions.
Retrieves a paginated list of users. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for name, username, or email.

post.description: Registers a new user and assigns them roles. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

get.description: Retrieves the profile details of a single user. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

put.description: Updates profile info, roles, and status of a user. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

delete.description: Sets a user's status to 'inactive' to block login while preserving historical transaction records. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_users' permission.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of stock movements. Access is restricted to users with 'view_inventory' permission.
Retrieves movements for a specific product. Access is restricted to users with 'view_inventory' permission.
Retrieves list of receivings. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search keyword for supplier, invoice number, or billing number.

post.description: Records a new incoming stock from a supplier and increments product stock levels. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

delete.description: Deletes a draft stock receiving. Completed receiving cannot be deleted. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.

post.description: Manually adjusts the stock of a product (damage, loss, etc.). Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

get.description: Retrieves list of opnames. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

post.description: Records a new draft stock opname. Does not modify actual product stock. Access is restricted to users with 'manage_inventory' permission.

delete.description: Deletes a draft stock opname sheet. Completed opname cannot be deleted. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search keyword for product name or brand.

parameters.name: low_stock
parameters.description: When true, return products with stock less than or equal to 5.

get.description: Retrieve active product detail by barcode. Accessible by all authenticated roles.

patch.description: Toggles product status between active and inactive. Restricted to manage_products permission.

get.description: Returns the authenticated cashier's open cash drawer session, or null when no drawer is open.

post.description: Starts a new open cash drawer session for the authenticated cashier. A cashier can only have one open session.

get.description: Retrieves cash drawer sessions. Restricted to users with view_cash_drawer permission.
Returns a cash drawer session with movements and transactions. Cashiers can view their own sessions; supervisors and managers can view all sessions.

post.description: Adds cash to an open drawer and updates expected cash.
Removes cash from an open drawer and updates expected cash.
Closes an open drawer by comparing expected cash with the counted closing balance.
Creates a sale, stores item snapshots, validates stock, and decreases product stock.

post.summary: Pay transaction with split cash and card

get.description: Retrieve daily sales metrics. Restricted to view_reports permission.
Get a paginated, filterable, and searchable list of system activity logs. Restricted to users with manage_users permission.
List all suppliers for dropdown selects. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.
Get a paginated list of suppliers. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.

post.description: Register a new supplier master data. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.

patch.description: Updates payment status of receiving invoice. Restricted to manage_inventory permission.

get.summary: Print standard grid of barcodes for a single product
Print grid of barcodes for multiple products in bulk

post.summary: Print grid of barcodes for multiple products in bulk

BearerAuth.description: Enter the Sanctum plainTextToken retrieved from login.
